microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized deployment system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a replicable validation model adopted across enterprise customer deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating client IT teams, security requirements, and compliance stakeholders end-to-end.

Built and deployed an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows with LLM-powered automation to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase annual drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Developed and maintained technical documentation and enablement materials for partner integrations with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp, accelerating **client onboarding** and reducing implementation ambiguity across each deployment cycle.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based **YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured interviews with Azure service team SMEs to surface critical workflow gaps, translating ambiguous customer requirements into prioritized, actionable feature specifications.

Improved data integrity and accelerated retrieval by enforcing rigorous **metadata standards** and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool — cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling more precise, structured data models for downstream platform use.

Conducted technical discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate critical execution paths — directly informing ETL pipeline prioritization and self-service tooling investment.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact support investments, and allocate engineering resources to the highest-ROI client deployment bottlenecks.

Translated ambiguous, cross-org requirements into a structured data model and prioritization framework, demonstrating the ability to work with SMEs across large enterprises to map messy business data into **coherent, actionable system logic**.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain deployment velocity across a distributed, cross-functional client-facing engineering team.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs — establishing a scalable integration model for future robotics platform rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a structured CRM implementation, reducing manual errors and creating a repeatable, data-driven client engagement workflow.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to improve lead quality and align messaging with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and close margin leaks, delivering structured data insights that directly shaped executive decision-making on service line strategy.
